title: What date does UiPath's (PATH) report Earnings - Earnings Calendar & Announcement
text: Zacks earnings calendar provides UiPath (PATH) earnings dates and expectations. Next earnings date scheduled for May 28, 2026, with expectations for Q1 FY2027 results announcement. Consensus EPS estimate approximately $0.15 per share, revenue estimate approximately $397.43 million. Historical performance: Over past 2 years, PATH has beaten EPS estimates 100% of time and beaten revenue estimates 100% of time. Estimate revisions: Over 3 months leading to May 2026 earnings, EPS estimates saw 12 upward revisions and 2 downward, indicating analyst confidence. Revenue estimates saw 9 upward revisions and 5 downward over same period. Full year FY2027 guidance: Revenue $1.754-1.759B, ARR >$2B target, Non-GAAP operating income ~$415M. Company guidance reflects confidence in execution and growth momentum. Key catalysts: Product innovations in agentic automation, government/regulated industry expansion, and continued AI adoption should support forward guidance and analyst sentiment. Zacks historical data shows UiPath's consistent earnings beat track record provides confidence in near-term results.
